title: Bluemap Resourcepack Non Transparent Tree Leaves
description:
Resource pack addon for Bluemap, making tree leaves non-transparent. 

Supports all Bluemap versions.
body: #### Resource pack addon for Bluemap, making tree leaves non-transparent. #### Supports all Bluemap versions. #### ![ ](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fG8iGgxB/images/03b852e615d3f54da1d856acd53e017a4b2ba6a0.png) ![ ](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fG8iGgxB/images/7519a3d9addb75f58e44e2d00208851f0047b8c1.png)
